LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION HEARING ON DEMURRER TO AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF MAY-02-1995 TENTATIVE RULING WAS RECORDED WAS IN ERROR. THE CORRECT TENTATIVE WAS TO OVERRULE THE DEMURRER WITH 20 DAYS TO ANSWER. IN VIEW OF ERROR, COUNSEL MAY REQUEST A RE-HEARING ON THE MOTION WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM POSTING OF THIS MINUTE ORDER.
